text.title: Error Handling in VUI Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Was the failure no-input or misrecognition?

conclusion.verdict: use no-input ladder — focus on presence
rung 3 — escalate to visual / DTMF / human

example.trace: user gave unclear request → rung 1 fails → rung 2 with examples fails → rung 3 visual escalation

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
